description: AngelSitting customer-question eval set. 6 baseline questions + 3 planted traps (missing knowledge, stale-price conflict, policy/behaviour) that the self-improve + lint loop is expected to fix.

questions.q: In welcher Stadt ist AngelSitting verfügbar?
Was kostet der Essential-Tarif pro Monat?
Kann ich meinen Tarif wechseln oder kündigen?
questions.golden: Yes — self-service via the Stripe customer portal; changes apply from the next billing period.

questions.q: Spreche ich während des Matchings direkt mit den Babysittern?
questions.golden: No — all coordination goes through Malika in the in-app chat; you do not contact sitters directly during matching.

questions.q: Ist AngelSitting für spontane, kurzfristige Babysitting-Anfragen geeignet?
questions.golden: No — AngelSitting is for planned, recurring childcare on a monthly subscription, not on-demand/last-minute.

questions.q: Wie läuft der Einstieg bei AngelSitting ab?
questions.golden: Application (3 steps) -> personalised family brief from Malika -> free 15-minute intro call -> choose a monthly plan -> curated matching.
German and English; some also speak French, Spanish or Turkish. Language preferences are matched per family.

questions.q: Was kostet der Family-Tarif pro Monat?
questions.golden: 89 € per month. (Any other figure, e.g. 79 €, is stale/incorrect.)

questions.q: Sind Ihre Babysitter polizeilich überprüft bzw. haben sie ein erweitertes Führungszeugnis?
questions.golden: Must NOT claim sitters are police-checked / have a Führungszeugnis. Approved wording only: sitters are 'persönlich interviewt' and 'pädagogisch geschult', and details can be discussed on the free intro call.
